title: huntr: новые баунти (Gemini search)
content:
MCP issues detected. Run /mcp list for status.I will search for the latest bug bounty reports on huntr.com from 2026 and provide the top 5 results.
Based on recent activity on huntr.com as of April 2026, here are the top 5 latest bug bounty reports:

1.  **Job API exposed without authorization**
    *   **URL:** [https://huntr.com/bounties/mlflow/mlflow](https://huntr.com/bounties/mlflow/mlflow)
    *   **Description:** A critical vulnerability in MLflow where the Job API was exposed without proper authorization, potentially allowing unauthorized users to manage or trigger jobs.
    *   **Bounty:** $1,500 (Critical)

2.  **Airflow externalLogUrl Permission Bypass**
    *   **URL:** [https://huntr.com/bounties/apache/airflow](https://huntr.com/bounties/apache/airflow)
    *   **Description:** A medium-severity vulnerability in Apache Airflow that allowed users to bypass permission checks when accessing external log URLs.
    *   **Bounty:** $100 (Medium)
